title: Emerald Armor Plugin
description: Are you searching a unique Minecraft Server Plugin for your Server ? Install this Plugin to add EMERALD Armor In-Game
body: Are you searching for a Unique but Simple Plugin for your Server that requires minimal Knowledge about Plugins or Configs ? Install the Emerald Armor Plugin, a simple but functional Plugin that adds Crafting Recipes for Emerald Armor + Tools. Every Tool has his own Enchantments !
